ground_height.description: Ground height offset in meters applied to the IFC output.

default_depth_m.description: Default building depth (meters) used when depth is missing; can be null.

force_depth_m.description: If true, always override computed depth with default_depth_m.

debug_depth_log.description: If true, prints detailed depth/polygon source debug logs.

polygon_source.description: Preferred polygon source: POUM, Cadastre, or both with fallback.

poum_mode.description: POUM polygon matching mode: exact parcel or zoning zone.

poum_zone_area_ratio_threshold.description: Max allowed POUM zone area / cadastre area ratio before falling back to cadastre.

poum_simplify_zone.description: If true, simplify POUM zone polygons before intersection.

poum_zone_intersection.description: If true, intersect POUM zone polygon with cadastre parcel polygon.

roof_rise_max_m.description: Max roof rise (meters) for roof geometry generation.
